use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers with feature lists for SaaS products
Show multiple pricing plans side-by-side for comparison
Present feature highlights with call-to-action buttons
Enable users to select pricing plans with visual hierarchy
Show pricing value propositions with organized feature categories
ai_summary: A pricing card component designed for displaying subscription tiers and feature comparisons. Typically includes plan names, pricing amounts, feature lists with checkmarks, and CTA buttons. Built with Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Supports hover interactions and likely includes multiple plan variations. Commonly used in SaaS landing pages and product sites to present pricing options with clear value differentiation.
